acceptance_criteria: The validation readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
The validation gate records passing evidence in status/readiness.json.
completion_signals: validate_build_pack_contract reaches pass state.
Validation evaluation evidence is recorded under eval/history and linked from status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Validation reports schema or contract failures that the current task scope cannot resolve safely.
tasks.summary: Run the validation readiness-evaluation workflow and capture canonical validation evidence.

acceptance_criteria: The benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
Inherited benchmark gates update from not_run to pass or waived.
completion_signals: Benchmark evaluation evidence records results in eval/latest/index.json.
Required benchmark gates advance to pass or waived in status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Benchmark output fails to update readiness or eval state through the existing bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Run the benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria: The runtime pack exposes a bounded operator-intake workflow that records inspectable intake artifacts, refines the operator profile in a merge-friendly way, and writes relationship memory for stable signals.
The new intake workflow is discoverable through local contracts, prompts, and docs without introducing hidden adaptation behavior.
completion_signals: A CLI surface exists to inspect the operator-intake contract and record a bounded intake/refinement update.
Runtime contracts, docs, and local state surfaces clearly show how intake updates affect operator alignment.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the intake feature is added.
escalation_conditions: The intake workflow would require hidden profile mutation or non-inspectable adaptation rules.
The runtime and template models diverge in a way that cannot be backported cleanly.
tasks.summary: Add a structured operator-intake and profile-refinement workflow to the runtime assistant.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant can distill a bounded session update into durable relationship memory without rewriting the operator profile on weak signals.
The distillation behavior stays inspectable through local artifacts and existing assistant memory surfaces.
completion_signals: A bounded distillation workflow exists for session-level operator learning.
Distilled memory promotion rules are documented and validated through existing pack surfaces.
escalation_conditions: Session distillation would require adding broad new tests or opaque heuristics.
Stable-signal promotion cannot be expressed through local contracts and assistant memory.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded session-memory distillation and promotion workflow.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant can surface grounded accountability prompts and drift checks that align with the operator's declared direction.
Grounding/accountability guidance remains business-like, brief, and fail-closed on ambiguity.
completion_signals: The runtime assistant exposes a discoverable grounding/accountability cadence tied to the operator profile and partnership policy.
Existing validation and smoke surfaces continue to pass after the grounding cadence is introduced.
escalation_conditions: Accountability behavior starts pretending to have human emotion or certainty the local evidence does not support.
The cadence cannot stay bounded inside the current pack-local contracts and docs.
tasks.summary: Add a grounded accountability and anti-drift cadence to the runtime assistant.

acceptance_criteria: The relationship-state surface exposes which operator-learning signal categories are already covered, which are still thin, and the next bounded intake prompts that would make the assistant less generic.
The alignment summary mirrors the relationship-learning gap signals without introducing a second personalization subsystem.
completion_signals: show-relationship-state returns covered_signal_categories, missing_signal_categories, and next_learning_prompts sourced from the operator-intake contract.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the relationship-learning gap visibility update is added.
escalation_conditions: Improving relationship-state visibility would require a parallel personalization model instead of extending the existing inspectable surface.
The runtime and template relationship-state outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Make relationship-learning coverage gaps and next intake prompts explicit through the existing relationship-state surface.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant exposes an inspectable recurring business-grounding review loop that tells the operator when a review is due, what questions should guide it, and what the latest review concluded.
The business-grounding review loop reuses the existing grounding, relationship, and partnership-policy surfaces instead of introducing a hidden planner or duplicate personalization system.
completion_signals: show-business-review returns a bounded review summary with due-state, review questions, and current relationship-learning gaps.
record-business-review writes inspectable local review artifacts and the alignment summary reflects the latest business review status.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the review loop is added.
escalation_conditions: The review loop would require a broad planning subsystem or hidden adaptation behavior instead of a bounded inspectable review artifact.
The runtime and template review-loop surfaces diverge in a way that cannot be proven through the existing validation and smoke benchmark commands.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded recurring business-grounding review loop to the assistant runtime.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant can show whether preference evidence is missing, tentative, repeated, or confirmed without inventing a separate hidden scoring system.
Preference-strength tracking reuses the existing relationship-state, memory, and alignment surfaces so the signal remains inspectable and backportable.
completion_signals: show-relationship-state exposes signal-strength details by category and a dedicated preference-strength status.
show-alignment mirrors the current preference-strength status for quick operator inspection.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the preference-strength tracking update is added.
escalation_conditions: Preference-strength tracking would require a new opaque scoring subsystem instead of a bounded rollup of existing inspectable evidence.
The runtime and template preference-strength outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add bounded preference-strength tracking on top of the existing relationship-state surface.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant exposes a bounded navigation and fundamentals-guidance loop that helps when the operator knows the direction but not the full roadmap.
The guidance loop stays inspectable through the existing grounding, alignment, contract, and prompt surfaces instead of introducing a hidden planning subsystem.
completion_signals: show-navigation-guidance and run-navigation-check help distinguish exploration, execution, and fundamentals-first work.
The operator profile and partnership policy make navigation and fundamentals-support behavior explicit in both the runtime pack and the source template.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the navigation-guidance update lands.
escalation_conditions: The navigation loop would require a hidden planner or roadmap generator instead of a bounded inspectable guidance surface.
The runtime and template navigation outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded navigation and fundamentals-guidance loop for curvy-path work.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant can explicitly help when the operator has a stable direction but not a clear roadmap yet.
Navigation-under-uncertainty and fundamentals guidance stay bounded to the existing grounding, alignment, and partnership-policy surfaces instead of creating a hidden planning subsystem.
completion_signals: The runtime assistant exposes inspectable navigation-guidance surfaces that distinguish exploration, learning, and execution while keeping the north star visible.
The runtime and template packs both pass existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces after the navigation and fundamentals guidance update.
escalation_conditions: Navigation guidance would require a broad hidden planner instead of a bounded extension of the current grounding surfaces.
The runtime and template navigation outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add bounded navigation-under-uncertainty and fundamentals guidance to the assistant runtime.

acceptance_criteria: Meaningful session closeouts refresh assistant-local continuity so the next restart sees a healthy latest-memory pointer.
Continuity health is visible through existing alignment and diagnostic surfaces instead of a hidden or separate memory subsystem.
completion_signals: record-business-review writes a bounded continuity checkpoint into assistant memory.
show-alignment and doctor report continuity as healthy, stale, or missing using the same continuity source of truth.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the continuity update lands.
escalation_conditions: Continuity would require a second hidden memory system instead of extending the existing assistant-memory surface.
The runtime and template continuity outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded daily-session continuity checkpoint that refreshes assistant memory at business-review closeout.

acceptance_criteria: Business-review closeout leaves inspectable carry-forward history in session distillation without auto-promoting one fresh observation into durable relationship truth.
Relationship-state surfaces show thin-history status and repeated-signal readiness without hidden scoring.
completion_signals: record-business-review writes a bounded closeout distillation artifact alongside continuity memory.
show-relationship-state and show-alignment expose carry-forward observation counts and thin-history guidance while keeping durable signal strength conservative.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass after the history-enrichment update lands.
escalation_conditions: History enrichment would require hidden scoring or silent durable promotion instead of inspectable distillation state.
The runtime and template carry-forward outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add bounded thin-history enrichment so closeout sessions leave inspectable carry-forward distillation without overstating durable learning.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant exposes an inspectable recurring relationship-reflection loop that tells the operator which missing relationship signal should be filled next and why.
The recurring reflection loop reuses operator-intake as the only write path instead of creating a second hidden personalization subsystem.
completion_signals: show-business-review, show-relationship-reflection, and show-alignment expose the same bounded reflection status for missing or tentative relationship signals.
record-relationship-reflection writes through record-operator-intake and keeps the reflection inspectable through existing relationship-state surfaces.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass in both the runtime and template packs after the reflection loop lands.
escalation_conditions: The reflection loop would require a second hidden learning store instead of reusing operator-intake.
The runtime and template reflection outputs diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded recurring relationship-reflection loop that reuses operator-intake to fill missing relationship signals.

acceptance_criteria: The assistant exposes a bounded preference-calibration surface that refuses to write a new preference calibration until a current business-review anchor exists.
Preference calibration reuses operator-intake as the inspectable write path and defaults follow-through to the latest grounded business-review next step when the operator does not provide one.
completion_signals: show-preference-calibration tells the operator whether business review must happen first, whether preference calibration is due, and which bounded surface should be used next.
record-preference-calibration writes through record-operator-intake, keeps contract refinement explicit, and strengthens preference signal status without hidden profile mutation.
Existing validation and smoke benchmark surfaces pass in both the runtime and template packs after preference calibration lands.
escalation_conditions: Preference calibration would require hidden profile mutation or a second personalization subsystem instead of reusing operator-intake.
The runtime and template preference-calibration surfaces diverge in a way that cannot be validated through the current bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Add a bounded business-review anchor plus preference-calibration flow that keeps new preference writes grounded and inspectable.
